headline: Vistra (VST) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Vistra (VST) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock down 3.4% over the past day and 0.3% over the past month. This has prompted closer scrutiny from investors. See our latest analysis for Vistra. Looking beyond the latest move, Vistra's share price has eased over the past quarter and year to date, while the very large 3 year and 5 year total shareholder returns point to a stock that has already rewarded patient investors. headline: As Trump Predicts Gas Prices Will 'Drop Like A Rock,' Moody's Chief Economist Estimates $100 Billion Iran War Cost To Americans
summary: Moody's warns Trump's Iran War costs US households $750, delivering a massive economic blow as surging gas prices erase recent tax refunds.
